title: elatine triandra var. orientalis
intro: Elatine triandra var. orientalis, also known as the Asian waterwort, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Elatinaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elatine triandra var. orientalis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Elatine triandra var. orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs for various medicinal purposes.
